raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_1 is reachable by the left arm and there is sufficient clearance in front of the stack so the robot can press against box_1 without colliding with the tabletop or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is firmly constrained against the table surface, preventing it from shifting while the upper box is manipulated."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is unobstructed and there is at least 40 cm of free tabletop space to the right so that box_2 can slide off box_1 without hitting other objects. box_1 is currently stabilized by the left arm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is slid to the right and now rests directly on the tabletop, detached from and no longer overlapping box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is no longer on top of box_1, leaving all sides of box_1 accessible. Both arms are free and can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without obstruction.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely held between the two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop, fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_1 is reachable by the left arm and there is sufficient clearance in front of the stack so the robot can press against box_1 without colliding with the tabletop or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is firmly constrained against the table surface, preventing it from shifting while the upper box is manipulated.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is unobstructed and there is at least 40 cm of free tabletop space to the right so that box_2 can slide off box_1 without hitting other objects. box_1 is currently stabilized by the left arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is slid to the right and now rests directly on the tabletop, detached from and no longer overlapping box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is no longer on top of box_1, leaving all sides of box_1 accessible. Both arms are free and can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without obstruction.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely held between the two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop, fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box.
